title: Fix subclass with rand_mode(0) getting randomized (#7376)

features.name: class inheritance with rand member and rand_mode
features.description: Code should include a class that extends a base class, contains a rand member variable, and uses rand_mode() to control randomization

features.name: nested random class member in parent class
features.description: Code should include a parent class with a rand member that is itself a class instance with random properties

features.name: rand_mode(0) on sub-object member during parent randomization
features.description: Code should include calling rand_mode(0) on a nested class member before calling randomize() on the parent object
